title: Adventure Russification [Ru]
description: resource pack translation for the adventure souls build
body:
Resource pack that modifies and adds the Russian localization for the [Adventure Souls ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adventure-souls).

The entire translation is designed in the style of Vanila-minecraft

Below is a list of mods currently translated


![Everything is taken directly from the resource pack folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71eb73d6d538550bf2e35b8435bdf37a883a3b56.jpeg)
